name: workItems.execute
description: Start execution of a work item using the GuideAI Execution Protocol (GEP). This initiates the 8-phase execution process (PLANNING → CLARIFYING → ARCHITECTING → EXECUTING → TESTING → FIXING → VERIFYING → COMPLETING) with the assigned agent.

work_item_id.description: ID or display ID (e.g. 'myproject-42') of the work item to execute (required)

agent_id.description: Optional agent ID override. If not provided, uses the assigned agent.

idempotency_key.description: Optional idempotency key to prevent duplicate executions

model_override.description: Optional model ID to override agent's default model (e.g., 'claude-opus-4-5', 'gpt-5-2')

output.description: Returns execution status with run_id, status, phase, and metrics

run_id.description: Unique run ID for tracking execution
